query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR '|') as columns
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR '|') as columns
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
